PPC Attribute Binding Test

Tests that HTML attributes are correctly synced to PPC component state

Test 1: Default Values (no attributes)

Test 2: Boolean Attribute Present (multiple, disabled)

Test 3: Boolean Attribute = "true"

Test 4: Boolean Attribute = "false"

Test 5: Dynamic Binding :multiple="true"

Test 6: Dynamic Binding :multiple="false"

Test 7: String Attributes

Test 8: Number Attributes

Test 9: Dynamic Number Binding

Test 10: Mixed Attributes (Real-world Scenario)
